name: matn
description: A calm, right-to-left Markdown reader for Arabic: reading themes, embedded Arabic fonts, syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, callouts, wikilinks, search, and live reload. Runs locally in your browser.

scripts.check: node --check bin/matn.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/state-store.mjs && node --check src/platform-actions.mjs && node --check src/stdin-session.mjs && node --check src/codex-open-in-config.mjs && node --check src/render-core.cjs && node --check src/render-worker.js && node --check src/search-core.cjs && node --check src/link-core.cjs && node --check src/book-core.cjs && node --check src/annotation-core.cjs && node --check scripts/configure-codex-open-in.mjs && node --check scripts/build-docs.mjs && node --check scripts/performance-fixtures.mjs && node --check e2e/performance.playwright.mjs

author: Ali Aljarallah
